pageHeader.title: Website Pricing
pageHeader.subtitle: Two straightforward packages—upfront plus light monthly, or zero upfront with full ongoing care and growth.

hero.subtitle: Pick the package that matches how you want to invest: a lower monthly with upfront ownership, or all-inclusive care with no upfront fee.

packages.name: Essential Build
packages.tagline: SEO-ready site with domain, hosting, and maintenance—content and design edits are billed hourly.

includes.text: Maintenance: Edits charged at an hourly rate.

packages.name: Growth Accelerator
packages.tagline: Everything in Essential Build, plus ongoing optimization, reporting, unlimited edits, and always-on support.

growthStory.title: Built for effortless growth
growthStory.body: Our process removes the complexity of launching and maintaining a digital presence. We focus on technical excellence so you can focus on your business goals.

image.alt: Modern workspace and digital growth — effortless web presence

items.title: FAST LAUNCH
items.body: Modern stacks and lean handoffs so your site ships on time and stays easy to extend.

items.title: SECURITY FIRST
items.body: SSL, sensible defaults, and maintenance options that keep your site and visitors safer.

items.title: CLEAN CODEBASE
items.body: Readable structure and docs so the next developer — or you — never hits a wall.

policyNote.title: Important Policy Note
policyNote.body: Under our Managed Service Agreement, the website remains the property of Nice Guy Web Design. In the event of service cancellation, the website will be taken down after a 30-day transition period. Code and assets are not transferable unless a buyout agreement is reached.

consultCta.title: Need a custom build?
consultCta.body: Tell me what you sell, who you serve, and what's broken today — I'll recommend a simple path and honest pricing.
